creator: mmatalka@gmail.com
text:
Plugging headphone jack in switches audio automatically just fine, however I cannot record any audio with onboard mic or headphones.

12th Gen Framework - i7-1260P

hdaa0: <Tempo 92HD95B Audio Function Group> at nid 1 on hdacc0
pcm0: <Tempo 92HD95B (Analog 2.0+HP/2.0)> at nid 13,10 and 14,11 on hdaa0


Let me know if there is any other information I can give.
